name: fade-in
css_keyframes: opacity 0 to 1

name: fade-out
css_keyframes: opacity 1 to 0

name: slide-up-in
css_keyframes: translateY(16px)+opacity 0 to translateY(0)+opacity 1

name: slide-down-in
css_keyframes: translateY(-16px)+opacity 0 to translateY(0)+opacity 1

name: slide-right-in
css_keyframes: translateX(-24px)+opacity 0 to translateX(0)+opacity 1

name: slide-left-in
css_keyframes: translateX(24px)+opacity 0 to translateX(0)+opacity 1

name: scale-in-spring
css_keyframes: scale(0.85)+opacity 0 to scale(1)+opacity 1 with overshoot at 95ms to scale(1.03)

name: scale-out
css_keyframes: scale(1)+opacity 1 to scale(0.9)+opacity 0

name: shimmer-skeleton
css_keyframes: background-position from -200% to 200% on linear-gradient

name: spin-loader
css_keyframes: rotate(0deg) to rotate(360deg) continuous

name: bounce-in
css_keyframes: translateY(0) to translateY(-8px) to translateY(0) with 3 oscillations decreasing amplitude

name: toast-slide-up
css_keyframes: translateY(100%)+opacity 0 to translateY(0)+opacity 1; exit reverses

name: drawer-slide-right
css_keyframes: translateX(100%) to translateX(0); exit reverses

name: progress-fill
css_keyframes: transform scaleX(0) to scaleX(target)
reduced_motion_alt: instant jump to value; no fill animation

name: count-up-number
css_keyframes: custom JS interpolation from 0 to target value; not CSS; use requestAnimationFrame
reduced_motion_alt: show final number instantly; no count-up

name: ripple-touch
css_keyframes: scale(0) to scale(2.5) + opacity 0.3 to 0 from touch point
reduced_motion_alt: background-color darken on active; no ripple

name: modal-scale-in
css_keyframes: scale(0.96)+opacity 0 to scale(1)+opacity 1 (Material container transform emphasized)

name: modal-scale-out
css_keyframes: scale(1)+opacity 1 to scale(0.96)+opacity 0

name: backdrop-fade
css_keyframes: opacity 0 to 0.5 scrim overlay (Material HIG dim)

name: accordion-expand
css_keyframes: transform scaleY(0) to scaleY(1) with transform-origin top

name: accordion-collapse
css_keyframes: transform scaleY(1) to scaleY(0) with transform-origin top

name: tooltip-fade-scale
css_keyframes: scale(0.92)+opacity 0 to scale(1)+opacity 1 (Apple HIG subtle pop)

name: button-press
css_keyframes: scale(1) to scale(0.97) on active then back (Material state feedback)
reduced_motion_alt: no scale; rely on color state change

name: checkbox-check
css_keyframes: scale(0) to scale(1) on checkmark glyph

name: page-shared-axis-x
css_keyframes: translateX(30px)+opacity 0 to translateX(0)+opacity 1 (Material shared axis X)

name: page-fade-through
css_keyframes: opacity 1 to 0 outgoing then opacity 0 to 1 incoming (Material fade through)

name: card-hover-lift
css_keyframes: translateY(0) to translateY(-4px) (elevation hint via transform)
reduced_motion_alt: no lift; rely on shadow or outline state

name: fab-morph-in
css_keyframes: scale(0)+opacity 0 to scale(1)+opacity 1 emphasized-decelerate

name: chip-dismiss
css_keyframes: scale(1)+opacity 1 to scale(0.8)+opacity 0

name: snackbar-slide-in
css_keyframes: translateY(120%)+opacity 0 to translateY(0)+opacity 1 (Material standard)

name: pull-to-refresh-spin
css_keyframes: rotate(0deg) to rotate(360deg) tied to scroll then continuous

name: tab-indicator-slide
css_keyframes: translateX between active tab positions + scaleX width match

name: segmented-thumb-slide
css_keyframes: translateX of selected thumb between segments (Apple HIG)

name: skeleton-pulse
css_keyframes: opacity 0.4 to 1 to 0.4 pulsing placeholder

name: heart-burst
css_keyframes: scale(1) to scale(1.3) to scale(1) on like with overshoot
